title: Interior Department Approves Mine Plan of Operations for Nevada Lithium Project
content: The Department of the Interior approved the final mine plan of operations for a major Nevada lithium project, allowing construction to proceed. The decision follows a multi-year environmental review process and includes conditions related to groundwater monitoring.

title: Interior Department Announces Routine Land Survey Schedule for Western States
content: The Bureau of Land Management released its routine annual land survey schedule for several western states. The announcement is administrative in nature and does not affect any active permitting decisions.
